failures.description: The Executor fabricated an item ID and price instead of using the returned catalog evidence. The correct cheapest item was 5339029584 at $1128.99.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked for the cheapest available Smartphone. The tool output at index 3 returned two available smartphones sorted by ascending price: item 5339029584 at $1128.99 and item 1507389580 at $1157.86. At index 4, the Executor claimed item 0000000000 costs $0.01, but that item and price are absent from all prior evidence. The agent relied on this fabricated value to answer the user. This is not an invalid tool call, unsupported intent, underspecification, or system failure.
